description: Add a private durable ledger for automatic payment reconciliation and correlate each cron dispatch with its Edge Function execution without changing payment behavior.
deploymentOrder: verify the existing function/Vault secret names without printing values
deploy payments-reconcile only; do not invoke it
verify private grants, exactly two reconciliation jobs, and dispatcher-based commands
wait for the next automatic runs; do not invoke reconciliation manually
postReleaseVerification: payment_reconcile_runs has RLS enabled and no anon/authenticated policies or grants
dispatch/begin/complete RPCs are executable only by their documented internal roles
cron.job contains one sandbox and one live reconciliation job using dispatch_payment_reconcile
the five pre-existing non-payment cron jobs remain active and unchanged
rollback: Do not delete run records. A reviewed corrective migration may restore the two prior cron commands; the private ledger and RPCs can remain inert. Redeploy the previous payments-reconcile version only after the cron body is compatible.
